comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

I think we are unlikely to spend too much time on the aesthetics of that kind, compared to adding substantive features. We rely on an external library to draw the progress bars, and that’s going to continue to be the case.

Now, reconfiguring the existing library, or replacing it entirely, _is_ an option, in principle.

At this point, I don’t think this is worth tracking as an outstanding action item; if someone wants to propose or work on specific improvements, it can be discussed at that time.

(And the most appropriate place would be the https://github.com/containers/image repository.)
